title: qavor workspaces manifest
description: Workspace pointer file. Used only by multi-repo workspaces: it lives at the root of the (non-git) workspace directory as `qavor.yaml`, is created automatically by `qavor init`, and its only job is to reference the project repo dir whose `kind: project` manifest enumerates the rest of the workspace. Single-repo (`standalone: true`) projects have no workspaces manifest — the repo is its own workspace.

root_project_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the directory containing the project repo's `qavor.yaml` (kind: project).
